---
title: "mfgData"
output: html_document
date: "2025-12-02"
output:
  html_document:
  df_print: paged
  theme: tactile
  highlight: githubd
  prettydoc::html_pretty: null
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# data reading / organization
library(readxl)  
library(dplyr)
# plotting
library(ggformula)
# assumptions
library(car)
library(nortest)
# analyses
library(daewr)
library(lme4)
```
